recommendations: Test the API with a variety of employee data to ensure validation and error handling are correct.
Test the API with a large number of employees to ensure performance and scalability.

test_priorities.reason: This endpoint is used to get all employees and is a fundamental part of the API.
This endpoint is used to get a single employee by ID and relies on the existence of employees created by the first endpoint.
This endpoint is used to create a new employee and should be tested after verifying the get all employees endpoint.
